_metadata.description: Complete Crisis Hotline & Mental Health Support Directory for all Arab League countries and international organizations. Intended for use in the Aman RAG knowledge base.
_metadata.project: Aman - Arabic/English Emotional Wellness Support Agent
_metadata.important_notice: Hotline numbers are subject to change. Always verify before deployment. Some countries have limited or no formal mental health hotlines — alternative emergency contacts are provided in those cases.

rag_usage_notes.retrieval_strategy: Use metadata fields (country_code, language, availability, topics) for filtered retrieval. Prioritize entries where crisis_level = 'high' when emotional risk signals are detected.
rag_usage_notes.chunk_recommendation: Each country object should be stored as a single retrievable chunk with all its hotlines. Do NOT split individual hotline numbers into separate chunks.

hotlines.name: National Center for Mental Health Promotion – Psychological Counseling Helpline
hotlines.name_arabic: المركز الوطني لتعزيز الصحة النفسية – خط الإرشاد النفسي
hotlines.operator: National Center for Mental Health Promotion (NCMHP)
hotlines.notes: Primary government mental health helpline for KSA. Available during business hours only.

hotlines.name: National Social Care Helpline
hotlines.operator: Ministry of Human Resources and Social Development
hotlines.notes: Social welfare crisis line. Can be used for family crises, violence, and general distress.

hotlines.name: Child Protection Hotline
hotlines.notes: Dedicated child protection and abuse reporting line.

hotlines.name: Ministry of Health General Hotline
hotlines.notes: General health hotline that can provide mental health referrals.

online_resources.name: Tumani – Saudi Mental Health Awareness Portal
National Center for Mental Health Promotion

hotlines.name: Embrace Lifeline – National Suicide Prevention Hotline
hotlines.notes: Lebanon's primary suicide prevention and crisis intervention hotline. One of the most established mental health helplines in the Arab world. Also serves Arabic-speaking diaspora.

hotlines.name: IDRAAC Mental Health Line
hotlines.operator: Institute for Development Research Advocacy and Applied Care (IDRAAC)
hotlines.notes: Professional mental health support and referral service.

hotlines.name: Egypt Suicide Prevention Hotline
hotlines.notes: Primary suicide prevention contact for Egypt.

hotlines.name: Ministry of Health Mental Health Hotline
hotlines.operator: Ministry of Health and Population – Egypt
hotlines.notes: Free national mental health support line run by the Egyptian Ministry of Health.

hotlines.name: National Council for Women Hotline
hotlines.notes: Support line for women facing violence or crisis.

hotlines.name: JCPA Suicide and Crisis Line
hotlines.name_arabic: خط الأزمات للجمعية الأردنية لتعزيز الصحة النفسية
hotlines.notes: Primary crisis intervention line for Jordan.

hotlines.name: Jordan Family Protection Department
hotlines.notes: Family protection, domestic violence, and child abuse reporting.

hotlines.name: National Mental Support Line – MOHAP
hotlines.name_arabic: خط الدعم النفسي الوطني – وزارة الصحة
hotlines.operator: UAE Ministry of Health and Prevention (MOHAP)
hotlines.notes: Main government mental health support line. Number spells 'HOPE' on keypad.

hotlines.name: Community Development Authority Helpline
hotlines.notes: Dubai social welfare and family protection hotline.

hotlines.name: RAK Hospital Psychological Support Helpline
hotlines.name_arabic: خط الدعم النفسي – مستشفى رأس الخيمة
hotlines.notes: Staffed by clinical psychologists.

hotlines.name: National Mental Health Helpline
hotlines.notes: Qatar's primary mental health helpline, operated by the national healthcare provider.

hotlines.name: Ministry of Health National Hotline
hotlines.notes: General health hotline with mental health referral capability.

hotlines.name: Kuwait Psychological Medicine Hospital
hotlines.operator: Kuwait Ministry of Health – Psychological Medicine Hospital
hotlines.notes: Main psychiatric emergency and mental health contact for Kuwait.

hotlines.name: Social Care Hotline
hotlines.notes: Social affairs support line.

hotlines.name: Ministry of Health Psychiatric Services
hotlines.operator: Bahrain Ministry of Health – Psychiatric Hospital
hotlines.notes: Bahrain's national psychiatric hospital direct line.

hotlines.name: Bahrain Child Safety Campaign Hotline
hotlines.notes: Domestic violence and child protection line.

hotlines.name: Ministry of Health – Mental Health Department
hotlines.notes: Official mental health department contact for Oman.

hotlines.name: National Committee for Narcotics Affairs Helpline
hotlines.operator: National Committee for Narcotics and Psychotropic Substance Affairs
hotlines.notes: Support for substance use and addiction issues.

hotlines.name: Ministry of Health Mental Health & Psychosocial Support Hotline
hotlines.name_arabic: خط وزارة الصحة للدعم النفسي والاجتماعي
hotlines.notes: Nationwide line available in Arabic and Kurdish.

hotlines.name: DCVAW – Violence Against Women Hotline
hotlines.notes: Addresses violence against women; provides referrals for psychosocial support.

hotlines.name: SEMA Foundation for Mental Health
hotlines.notes: NGO providing mental health support, especially for trauma and conflict-affected individuals.

hotlines.name: Syria Mental Health Helpline – Syrian Arab Red Crescent
hotlines.name_arabic: خط الصحة النفسية – الهلال الأحمر العربي السوري
hotlines.notes: Operated by the Red Crescent; focuses on trauma and conflict-related mental health.

hotlines.name: Gaza Community Mental Health Programme
hotlines.notes: Availability may vary due to conflict conditions. GCMHP is a leading Palestinian mental health NGO.

hotlines.name: ICRC Palestine – Emergency Psychosocial Support
hotlines.operator: International Committee of the Red Cross (ICRC)
hotlines.notes: ICRC provides psychosocial support in conflict zones.

hotlines.name: UNICEF Palestine Mental Health Support
hotlines.notes: Focuses on mental health support for children and families.

hotlines.name: Moroccan Society of Psychiatry – Mental Health Assistance
hotlines.notes: Professional psychiatric consultation line.

hotlines.name: Moroccan Association for Listening and Psychological Support
hotlines.notes: Free 24/7 listening and psychological support line.

hotlines.name: Mental Health and Psychosocial Support Line
hotlines.notes: Support hotline for individuals in mental distress.

hotlines.name: Tunisian Association for Suicide Prevention
hotlines.notes: Primary suicide prevention line for Tunisia.

hotlines.name: Tunisian Association for the Defense of Mental Health
hotlines.name_arabic: الجمعية التونسية للدفاع عن الصحة النفسية
hotlines.operator: Tunisian Association for the Defense of Mental Health
hotlines.notes: Mental health support and advocacy.

hotlines.name: CAP – Psychological Assistance for Disaster Victims
hotlines.operator: Tunisian Ministry of Health – Volunteer Psychiatrists and Psychologists
hotlines.notes: Staffed by 200+ volunteer psychiatrists and psychologists from across Tunisia.

hotlines.name: Algerian Association for Listening and Psychological Support
hotlines.notes: Main psychological support line in Algeria.

hotlines.name: Association for Addiction Medicine Helpline
hotlines.operator: Association of Doctors in Addictology – Algeria
hotlines.notes: Specialized support for substance use and addiction.

hotlines.name: Libyan Psychosocial Support Hotline
hotlines.notes: Team of 6 psychologists. Operational during listed hours.

hotlines.name: National Centre for Disease Control – Psychosocial Support Line
hotlines.name_arabic: المركز الوطني لمكافحة الأمراض – خط الدعم النفسي
hotlines.operator: National Centre for Disease Control – Libya
hotlines.notes: General national health number with psychosocial support capability.

hotlines.name: Arrazi Psychiatric Hospital
hotlines.notes: Phone consultations available in morning hours.

hotlines.name: Sudan Ministry of Health – Mental Health Division
hotlines.name_arabic: وزارة الصحة السودانية – وحدة الصحة النفسية
hotlines.notes: Note: Availability may be disrupted due to ongoing conflict. Contact UNHCR or WHO EMRO as alternatives.

hotlines.name: UNHCR Sudan – Psychosocial Support
hotlines.notes: Critical resource given ongoing conflict. Physical access may be required.

online_resources.name: WHO Sudan Mental Health Emergency Response

hotlines.name: Ministry of Public Health – Mental Health Services Helpline
hotlines.name_arabic: وزارة الصحة العامة – خط خدمات الصحة النفسية
hotlines.operator: Yemen Ministry of Public Health and Population
hotlines.notes: Hours limited due to conflict. Availability may vary.

hotlines.name: Emergency Psychiatric Services – National Hospital
hotlines.notes: Limited formal mental health infrastructure. The national hospital is the primary psychiatric resource.

hotlines.name: WHO Somalia – Mental Health and Psychosocial Support
hotlines.notes: Somalia has very limited mental health infrastructure. WHO EMRO is the primary resource.

hotlines.name: Hôpital Général Peltier – Psychiatric Unit
hotlines.name_arabic: وحدة الطب النفسي – مستشفى بيلتيار العام
hotlines.notes: Djibouti has no formal psychiatrists. General practitioners with mental health interest manage cases here.

hotlines.name: El Maarouf Hospital – General Emergency
hotlines.notes: No dedicated mental health hotline exists in Comoros. The national hospital is the only resource.

international_organizations.name: International Association for Suicide Prevention (IASP)
international_organizations.description: Global directory of crisis centers by country. Best resource for finding local hotlines in any country.

international_organizations.name: Find A Helpline
international_organizations.description: Vetted global directory of 2000+ helplines. Covers all countries including Arab nations.

international_organizations.name: WHO Mental Health and Psychosocial Support Platform
international_organizations.name_arabic: منصة منظمة الصحة العالمية للصحة النفسية والدعم الاجتماعي
international_organizations.description: WHO EMRO regional platform specifically for Arab/Eastern Mediterranean mental health resources.

international_organizations.name: Befrienders Worldwide
international_organizations.phone: N/A – use website to find local center
international_organizations.description: International network of emotional support centers. Use website to find the nearest center.

international_organizations.name: Wojodi Amal – Arab Mental Health Crisis Directory
international_organizations.name_arabic: وجودي أمل – دليل الأزمات النفسية العربي
international_organizations.description: Arabic-focused crisis hotline directory. Primary verified source for Arab country hotlines.

international_organizations.name: Crisis Text Line
international_organizations.description: Text-based crisis support. Best for users who prefer not to call. Currently English-only.

international_organizations.name: Samaritans
international_organizations.description: UK-based emotional support for anyone in distress. Available internationally via email.

international_organizations.name: 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline
international_organizations.description: US national crisis line. Relevant for Arabic users residing in North America.

international_organizations.name: UNHCR – Psychosocial Support for Refugees
international_organizations.name_arabic: المفوضية السامية للأمم المتحدة – الدعم النفسي للاجئين
international_organizations.description: Critical resource for refugees and displaced persons across all Arab conflict zones.

international_organizations.name: IMH – International Mental Health Resource Hub
international_organizations.description: Comprehensive mental health information portal with professional resource directories.

international_organizations.name: Embrace Lebanon Online Clinic
international_organizations.availability: 24/7 crisis line; online clinic by appointment
international_organizations.description: Serves Lebanese and Arabic-speaking diaspora globally. Online clinic available internationally.

online_platforms_arabic.name: Nafsi
online_platforms_arabic.description: Leading Arabic-language online therapy platform across the Gulf and Arab world.

online_platforms_arabic.name: Shezlong
online_platforms_arabic.description: Egypt's leading online therapy platform. Arabic-first with licensed therapists.

online_platforms_arabic.name: Tumani
online_platforms_arabic.description: Saudi government mental health awareness portal. Free educational resources.

online_platforms_arabic.name: BetterHelp MENA
online_platforms_arabic.description: International online therapy platform with Arabic-speaking therapists available.

rag_quick_reference.description: Flat lookup table for rapid retrieval by country code. Optimized for Aman's crisis detection pipeline.
rag_quick_reference.usage: When crisis signals detected, retrieve this section by country_code and return the highest-priority hotline.

entries.note: Business hours only – refer to 937 (MOH) for 24/7
MOH Mental Health Department – business hours
MOH psychosocial support – Arabic and Kurdish
GCMHP – may be disrupted due to conflict
No dedicated hotline – use WHO EMRO
